caption: A man with blonde hair and glasses wears a dark blue t-shirt and white headphones while speaking into a black microphone. He is positioned in front of a screen displaying a blue-toned image and a decorated Christmas tree with glowing green and white lights. To the left of the man, large white text reads "HEIGHT" above the measurement "5' 10"". The background consists of a solid purple gradient. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression and mouth position shift slightly as he speaks. The on-screen text and background elements remain static, and no other people or significant changes occur in the scene.
